title: cardamine bellidifolia var. alpina
intro: Cardamine bellidifolia var. alpina, also known as Alpine Bittercress, is a perennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Alpine Bittercress are attributed to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which may help to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
